positive: A minimalist, stylized silhouette of a mountain range at sunset, rendered in a negative space aesthetic. The peaks are sharp and dramatic, set against a gradient sky that transitions from deep indigo to warm peach. Incorporate abstract geometric lines that subtly flow through the peaks, suggesting wind or energy. Use high contrast and bold, clean outlines. Composition should be centralized, ideal for a t-shirt print. Vector art quality, limited color palette (indigo, peach, black, white), clean lines, perfect for apparel.
